attrs.items: [{"question":"How long does setup take?","answer":"Most users get started in under 5 minutes. We provide guided onboarding and templates to help you hit the ground running."},{"question":"Can I integrate with my existing tools?","answer":"Yes, we support integrations with 500+ popular platforms including Slack, GitHub, Zapier, and more."},{"question":"What happens if I exceed my plan limit?","answer":"Your account won't be suspended. We'll notify you and you can upgrade anytime. Pay only for what you use."},{"question":"Is my data secure?","answer":"We use enterprise-grade encryption, SOC 2 compliance, and regular security audits. All data is backed up automatically."}]
